ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "user_segment" TEXT /* Segment of the user (e.g., student, professional, casual) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user (e.g., Microsoft, Apple) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of referral for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of the content (e.g., photo, video, article) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the content (e.g., Studying, Entertainment) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the content was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the content */,
  "creator_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the content */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the content has received */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the content has received */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments the content has received */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the content has been shared */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the content */,
  "is_ad" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the content is an advertisement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES content_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content item */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, like, comment) */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the interaction (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score assigned to the interaction */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the interaction */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Actual comment if the interaction type is a comment */,
  "share_target" TEXT /* Platform or user to whom the content was shared */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the interaction (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user during the interaction */,
  "interaction_score" INTEGER /* Detailed score for the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_interaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type") REFERENCES interaction_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "interest" TEXT /* Interest of the user (e.g., education, technology) */,
  "interest_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the user's interest (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES content_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "is_positive" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the interaction type is generally positive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
